_comment: WebhookConfig fixture for the basic literal-match demo (wait_for_webhook_basic_test.json). POST this to POST /api/metadata/webhook to register the webhook. Then POST /webhook/{id} with body {"event": {"type": "order_fulfilled"}} to trigger completion of any WAIT_FOR_WEBHOOK task in a running 'wait_for_webhook_basic_demo' workflow instance.
name: order-fulfillment-webhook
